hotels.name: Hôtel Hermitage Monte-Carlo
hotels.description_fr:
Idéalement situé à quelques pas de la place du Casino, l'Hôtel Hermitage Monte-Carlo bénéficie d'un cadre magnifique, puisqu’il surplombe la Méditerranée, le Rocher et le port de Monaco.

Cet établissement datant du début des années 1900 présente une architecture Belle Époque, avec sa splendide coupole installée dans le jardin d'hiver et conçue par Gustave Eiffel. Fidèle à la richesse de son patrimoine, cet hôtel comporte 262 chambres et suites, dont 54 suites junior, 32 suites et 13 suites « diamant ». Alliant harmonieusement authenticité et modernité, elles sont toutes ornées d’un mobilier classique.
hotels.description_en:
Ideally located steps from Casino Square, the Hôtel Hermitage Monte-Carlo enjoys a fabulous location overlooking the Mediterranean, the Rock, and the Port of Monaco.

Built in the early 1900s, its Belle Epoque architecture showcases the magnificent Eiffel cupola located in the Winter Garden and designed by Gustave Eiffel. Respecting its rich heritage, the hotel offers 262 rooms and suites, including 54 junior suites, 32 suites and 13 Diamond Suites with a perfect blend of authenticity and modernity, all decorated with classic furniture.

Whether you have a quick lunch at the Limùn bar after a shopping spree or indulge in a fabulous dinner at Yannick Alléno's Michelin-starred restaurant Pavyllon Monte-Carlo, you will enjoy an unforgettable culinary journey.
hotels.description_es:
El Hôtel Hermitage Monte-Carlo goza de una ubicación excelente, a un paseo de la plaza del Casino, y ofrece vistas al Mediterráneo, al peñón y al puerto de Mónaco.

Este edificio de arquitectura Belle Epoque fue construido a principios del siglo XX y muestra la magnífica cúpula Eiffel, situada en el jardín de invierno y diseñada por Gustave Eiffel. El hotel, que respeta su rico patrimonio, ofrece 262 habitaciones y suites con una mezcla perfecta de autenticidad y modernidad, entre ellas 54 suites junior, 32 suites y 13 suites diamond, todas decoradas con muebles clásicos.

Se puede disfrutar de un almuerzo rápido en el Limùn bar o de una cena en el restaurante con estrella Michelin de Yannick Alléno “Pavyllon Monte-Carlo”.

Built in the early 1900s, its Belle Epoque architecture showcases the magnificent Eiffel cupola located in the Winter Garden and designed by Gustave Eiffel. Respecting its rich heritage, the hotel offers 262 rooms and suites, including 54 junior suites, 32 suites and 13 Diamond Suites with a perfect blend of authenticity and modernity, all decorated with classic furniture.

Whether you have a quick lunch at the Limùn bar after a shopping spree or indulge in a fabulous dinner at Yannick Alléno's Michelin-starred restaurant Pavyllon Monte-Carlo, you will enjoy an unforgettable culinary journey.
hotels.description_it:
Situato in posizione ideale a pochi passi dalla Piazza del Casinò, l’Hôtel Hermitage Monte-Carlo offre una vista incantevole sul Mar Mediterraneo, sulla Rocca e sul Porto di Monaco.

Costruito agli inizi degli Anni 1900, l’hotel sorge in un edificio in stile Belle Époque impreziosito dalla magnifica cupola Eiffel, sita nel giardino d’inverno e progettata da Gustave Eiffel. Questo storico hotel propone 262 camere e suite, tra cui 54 junior suite, 32 suite e 13 suite diamond, tutte arredate con mobili classici e caratterizzate da un perfetto equilibrio tra autenticità e modernità.
